message: No documentation update needed. The triggering commit (a15c8e2 by @ryazhang-microsoft, PR #57866) is an internal bug fix to `CodeTransparencyRedirectPolicy` in `Azure.Security.CodeTransparency` that caches the redirect primary node URL for better performance. No new public APIs were added or removed, and the CHANGELOG.md was already updated with the fix description. No README or sample changes are required.
